errors.networkError: Network error, please check your connection

login.title: Sign in to admin panel
login.errEmpty: Please enter both username and password
login.errFailed: Sign-in failed, please check your network
login.firstTimeBodyPrefix: The password is written to the server log and
login.firstTimeBodySuffix: . Change it immediately after sign-in and store it safely.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Realtime view of engine and bridge state

bridges.title: Bridges
bridges.subtitle: Manage the Xboard node ↔ 3x-ui inbound mapping
bridges.drawerSubtitle: Saving will trigger a hot engine reload — no process restart needed.
bridges.nameLockedHint: Name is the primary key and cannot be changed when editing.
bridges.deleteConfirm: Confirm deleting bridge "{name}"? This is irreversible.
bridges.errIdsInvalid: Xboard node ID and 3x-ui inbound ID must be positive integers
bridges.emptyHint: Click the “Add bridge” button to add the first mapping.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage Xboard / 3x-ui credentials, sync intervals, reporting, log and Web settings

xui.title: 3x-ui panel
xui.subtitle: Node-side cookie login (username + password only)
xui.infoBannerPrefix: Since v0.4 only username + password (cookie) login is supported. Bearer token mode has been removed — if you upgrade from v0.2/v0.3, the old
xui.infoBannerSuffix: value is ignored; please fill in the 3x-ui admin username + password.
xui.totpClockHint: The local clock must be within 30 s of the 3x-ui host clock — TOTP is sensitive to drift (NTP sync required).

intervals.title: Sync intervals (seconds)
intervals.subtitle: Minimum 5 s to avoid stress on upstream APIs; defaults to 60 s as Xboard recommends

reporting.title: Optional reporting
reporting.subtitle: Online IP / node load — opt-in
reporting.aliveDesc: Used for Xboard device-count limit; iterates 3x-ui per email serially, slow when many users are online (capped at 8-way concurrency).
reporting.statusDesc: Pulls node load from 3x-ui server/status; only refreshes the Xboard load bar, unrelated to node-online judgement.

log.title: Log
log.subtitle: level supports hot reload; file / max_size / max_backups / max_age_days require restart

web.title: Web panel (restart required)
web.subtitle: Read-only at runtime — these are consumed once at process start.
web.tipPrefix: To change listen_addr, the easiest way is
web.tipMid: (writes a systemd drop-in override + restarts); other start-time fields need
web.tipSuffix: to edit the settings table directly, then restart the process.

account.title: Account & password
account.subtitle: View current admin info and change login password
account.passwordSubtitle: After change, all sessions are forcibly signed out and this session redirects to login.
account.errBothEmpty: Old and new passwords cannot be empty
account.errMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
account.errMismatch: The two new password entries don't match
account.okUpdated: Password updated; for safety all sessions are signed out, redirecting to login in 1.5 s…
